---
title: "Inspection Services"
---

::: {.section-intro}
Comprehensive erosion prevention and sediment control inspection services for construction sites across Upstate South Carolina — in full compliance with state and federal stormwater regulations.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="service-block">
  <h2>Weekly SWPPP Inspections</h2>
  <p>South Carolina's NPDES Construction General Permit requires that any land-disturbing activity of one acre or more have a <strong>Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP)</strong> and that a CEPSCI-certified inspector conduct weekly site inspections.</p>
  <p>Each inspection covers:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>All disturbed areas and areas graded since the last inspection</li>
    <li>All erosion prevention and sediment control BMPs (Best Management Practices)</li>
    <li>Construction material, waste, and chemical storage areas with potential stormwater exposure</li>
    <li>Areas where stormwater discharges off-site or to a surface water</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <h2>BMP Inspection &amp; Documentation</h2>
  <p>Proper installation and maintenance of erosion control measures is critical to keeping sediment on-site and out of South Carolina's waterways. I inspect and document:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Silt fences, inlet protection, and check dams</li>
    <li>Sediment basins and traps</li>
    <li>Temporary and permanent seeding, mulching, and soil stabilization</li>
    <li>Construction entrances and exit stabilization</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <h2>Professional Inspection Reports</h2>
  <p>Every inspection produces a clear, thorough written report including:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Date, time, weather conditions, and site conditions at time of inspection</li>
    <li>Identification of any discharges observed</li>
    <li>Description of any BMPs that need maintenance, repair, or replacement</li>
    <li>Corrective action recommendations with timelines</li>
    <li>Photo documentation of existing controls</li>
  </ul>
  <p>Reports are delivered digitally to your project manager, GC, and relevant municipal contacts promptly after each site visit.</p>
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <h2>Service Area</h2>
  <p><strong>Primary service counties:</strong></p>
  <ul>
    <li>Anderson County</li>
    <li>Pickens County</li>
  </ul>
  <p><strong>Also serving:</strong> Greenville, Spartanburg, Oconee, and surrounding Upstate SC counties. Contact me to confirm availability for your project location.</p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="cta-strip">
  <h2>Get a Quote</h2>
  <p>Every project is different. Reach out with your site address, acreage, and project timeline and I'll respond promptly.</p>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com" class="btn-cta">Email Darya →</a>
</section>
```
